title: Enderite Upgrade
description: Beyond Netherite lies true power — Enderite
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rUMMUMK4/images/75f23c8f37f6be81e13bfa72ea5328f937541dc9.png)
### Recipes

#### Craft Enderite Ingots and Upgrade Your Equipment

![the recipe of enderite ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rUMMUMK4/images/9bbaa3d8fa38308a82ae2194d32326f787ef9fd0_350.webp)

Drop **Enderite Ingots** together with your **Netherite equipment** on the ground, and the items will automatically upgrade to **Enderite** versions.
Even the **Elytra** can be upgraded!

#### Enderite Armored Elytra

The **Enderite Armored Elytra** was introduced in **v6**.
Drop an **Enderite Elytra** and an **Enderite Chestplate** together, and they will merge into the **Enderite Armored Elytra**.

---

### Improvements

Compared to Netherite **tools and weapons**, Enderite versions provide:

* +2 Attack Damage
* +0.2 Attack Speed
* +100% Block Breaking Speed
* +0.2 Attack Range

Compared to Netherite **armor**, Enderite armor provides:

* +100% Armor Toughness
* +100% Knockback Resistance
* +10% Movement Speed

The **Enderite Elytra** additionally grants:

* −50% Fall Damage
* +100% Safe Falling Distance
